lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: Third straight cycle pinned on one trivially-fixable HIGH: the working tree is unshipped and HEAD has not moved off 890b493 (2026-06-13), now three days cold. The tree is byte-identical to 06-15 (same four modified files, same three untracked entries, same git diff --stat). The uncommitted cohort is the doc fix (CHANGELOG v0.4.0/v0.4.1 dates -> 2026-06-07, docs/DESIGN.md rebrand to Yes&) plus the FUSE git-safety subsystem (scripts/git-guard.ps1 and its wiring), whose own header records that NUL-truncation has already corrupted .git on this mount. New this pass: two .bak files (discord-notify.ps1.bak, release.ps1.bak) are committed into HEAD, not untracked, so a plain ship commit will not sweep them and they need an explicit git rm. The escalation paused (tree no dirtier than 06-15) but still is not committed. One release.ps1 run or git add -A; git commit closes everything and reverts the verdict to healthy.
